description: The `TemplateAction` plugin is a generic template that can be customized to automate a reusable workflow step.
| Reusable Parameters  | Defines placeholder parameters that can be renamed for the target workflow. |
| Configurable Rules   | Provides starter rules that can be replaced with project-specific actions.  |
| Template Structure   | Preserves the expected template manifest structure for new automation work. |
| Workflow Scaffolding   | Starts a new template from a schema-safe baseline.                             |
| Action Composition     | Groups common automation rules behind a single reusable template key.          |
| Project Customization  | Provides a neutral starting point for project-specific automation definitions. |
Run the template action with placeholder input values that should be customized for the project.
Specifies the primary input value used by this template action.
parameters.name: InputValue

description: Specifies the target value or locator context used by this template action.
parameters.name: TargetValue

description: Specifies the argument expression passed to the template action. Customize this value to match the target workflow.
properties.name: Argument

summary: The `TemplateAction` plugin provides a generic, schema-safe starting point for reusable automation templates.
